headline: Workday (WDAY) Slid Over AI Risk
summary: Madison Investments, an investment advisor, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Madison Large Cap Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Madison Large Cap Fund (Class I) declined 2.7% in the quarter, outperforming the S&P 500’s -4.33% return. The fund focuses on long-term capital appreciation. The quarter saw […]

headline: How one terrible trip inspired a tech IPO: Navan Co-Founder
summary: Navan Co-founder and CEO Ariel Cohen shares with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi how his frustration with broken corporate travel systems led him to disrupt the industry, detailing Navan's journey to going public and the cutting-edge role of AI in modernizing business travel.

headline: Workday Bets On Trusted AI Agents And AWS Data Ties To Reignite Growth
summary: Workday (NasdaqGS:WDAY) announced new AI and data features, including the Agent Passport security compliance platform for AI agents. The company introduced new agentic developer tools through the Workday Build platform. Workday Data Cloud is now fully integrated with Amazon Web Services, enabling bi directional data connections. Cisco is partnering with Workday to provide third party validation of AI agent security. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:WDAY, these product moves arrive after a...
